name: @ai-canvas/desktop
description: Local-first scene-first mockup editor desktop app.
author: Nick Chadwick

scripts.dist:mac: pnpm --dir ../.. build:packages && pnpm build:app && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --target mac
scripts.dist:mac:unsigned: pnpm --dir ../.. build:packages && pnpm build:app && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --target mac --unsigned
scripts.dist:linux: pnpm --dir ../.. build:packages && pnpm build:app && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --target linux
scripts.dist:linux:x64: pnpm --dir ../.. build:packages && pnpm build:app && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --target linux --arch x64
scripts.dist:linux:arm64: pnpm --dir ../.. build:packages && pnpm build:app && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --target linux --arch arm64
scripts.dist:win: pnpm --dir ../.. build:packages && pnpm build:app && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --target win --arch x64
scripts.dist:win:x64: pnpm --dir ../.. build:packages && pnpm build:app && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --target win --arch x64
